misc: Has a habit of getting lost on golf course grounds
Does not spit in the glass
biography: Janne, a familiar face at the Hector Trophée, is known for his sportsmanship and generous nature. Representing Revontuli Golf, Janne has graced the tournament with his presence multiple times, becoming a recognizable figure among players and spectators alike.

Despite not having claimed either the Hector Trophée or the Victor Trophy, Janne's dedication to the sport is undeniable. His commitment to fair play and camaraderie on the course has earned him the respect of his peers.

Off the course, Janne is known for his peculiar habit of getting lost within the golf course grounds, often requiring assistance from fellow players and tournament staff to find his way. Moreover, Janne adheres to a strict code of conduct, always ensuring he does not spit in the glass, a testament to his refined manners.

Although Janne is not scheduled to participate in the upcoming Hector Trophée 2026, his contributions to past tournaments are fondly remembered, and the possibility of a last-minute entry always remains.
